chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. NO. S-81 OF 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge HEARING OF CASE. 1. For orders on office objection No.5,16 & 22 and reply as at A. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.03.2025. Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Safdar Ali Depar, AAG a/w SIP/Muhammad Tariq, P.S.KIA, District Korangi, Karachi -x-x-x-x-x- The Petitioner submits that he files probono litigations and when the notices are being issued by this Court, the Police registered false cases against him. He submits that he has submitted a compliant to the Inspector General of Police for redressal of his grievance but no action has been taken by him. Petitioner has also filed a copy of Complaint, which is appended with memo of Petition which is signed by the Petitioner and other. Local People are alleging that the land grabbers were encroaching upon the vacant Plots of the Society. The SSP and SHO of the District Korangi are directed to look into the complaint filed by the Petitioner and take appropriate action in accordance with the law within a period of one month from the receipt of this Order. The Office is directed to communicate this Order along with copy of complaint available at Page-37, to SSP Korangi. The Petitioner complaints that the number of FIRs registered against him but he is not aware whether those FIRs have been reported to the concerned Court under Section 173 Cr.P.C. or not. The SSP District Korangi shall also provide the list of cases which have been challanged in the Court of law within said period. The official Respondents are directed to strictly act in accordance with the law and the provide protection to the Petitioner as and when needed.

The SSP District Korangi shall also provide the list of cases which have been challanged in the Court of law within said period. The official Respondents are directed to strictly act in accordance with the law and the provide protection to the Petitioner as and when needed. In view of the above, this Petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Jamil
